creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tz
Date: Thu Feb  2 11:09:25 UTC 2017
New revision: 433139
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/433139

Log:
  www/pmwiki: Update from 2.2.93 to 2.2.94

  - webmasters are allowed to configure and use both .html and .htm extensions
  - The cached information about whether a page exists or not will now be
    cleared when that page is created or deleted.
  - The documentation was updated.

  PR:           216694
  Submitted by: Jochen Neumeister <joneum@bsdproject.de>

Changes:
  head/www/pmwiki/Makefile
  head/www/pmwiki/distinfo
